prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年西北大学在天津市综合科类最低录取位次分别为：2021年约9238名、2022年约9389名、2023年约10703名、2024年约10384名、2025年约9591名。整体 呈\"后移—回调\"的波动走势：2021至2023年后移约1465名，2024年小幅前移，2025年进一步前移至9591名，较2023年低位回升约1112名，显示近两年报考热度有所回暖；该校在天津市招生计划：2021–2023年均为35人，2024–2025年增至38人；2026年大幅扩招至63人，较2025年增加25人，增幅约65.8%。如此大幅度 的扩招将显著增加录取名额，对位次产生明显的后移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西北大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜排名约第70名（2026年），近年排名稳定 在64–70区间，属于中上游211院校，综合实力较强；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及文学院副教授贾浅浅被举报涉嫌抄袭事件，学校已成立工作专班调查， 反应较为迅速；抖音热度排名第81位，评价为\"一般\"，综合热度约28.9万，短视频曝光量中等偏低，未出现高热关注信号；近年无显著投档断档记录。整体声誉对报考热度影响 偏中性略负面；第五轮学科评估中，西北大学拥有地质学A、考古学A、软件工程A-共3个A-及以上学科。其中考古学与招生专业\"文物与博物馆学\"直接对应， 软件工程与\"计算机类\"、\"软件工程\"等专业关联，地质学与\"地球信息科学与技术\"、\"资源勘查工程\"等专业关联，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度显示：计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐；法学、汉语言文学分化观望；外国语言文学类、化工与制药类（属生化环材大类）热度 偏低或明显劝退。天津市2026年高考总考生约82000人（数据标注\"不确定\"），较2025年71938人增长约14%，竞争加剧；省控线2025年本科批476分，近年小幅上升，2026年数据 缺失；西北大学位于陕西省西安市（校本部），在天津市招生占比不高，无显著本省/邻省偏好信号；该校在陕西本省招生比例较大，跨省招生中天 津属普通外省市场，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次9591名、2026年招生计划大幅扩招约65.8%（63人 vs 38人）这一最强影响因素，以及天津市考生总数增长约14%带来的竞争加剧、声誉偏负面等次要因素，扩招效应显著大于考生增加效应，预计2026年最低录取位次将较2025年明显 后移。预测最低位次约13576名，区间13076–14076名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、物联网工程、软件工程）
- 文物与博物馆学
- 历史学（基地班）
- 信息与计算科学（网络安全实验班）
- 生物科学（华大创新班）
- 地理科学类。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 物理学类（物理学、应用物理学、材料物理、光电信息科学与工程）
- 化学（基地班）
- 地球信息科学与技术
- 食品科学与工程
- 工商管理类（工商管理、会计学）
- 金融学（开源证券智能金融实验班）
- 化工与制药类
- 国际经济与贸易（全球丝路合作发展方向）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 社会工作
- 外国语言文学类（英语、日语、俄语）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年西北大学在天津市大幅扩招至63人，预测最低位次约13576名，区间13076–14076名。位次在此区间内的考生建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。 位次明显优于区间下限（如13000名以内）可重点冲刺计算机类、文物与博物馆学等一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（14000名左右）应以三档专业保底、二档专业为主。注意化 工与制药类、工商管理类等社会热度偏低的专业可能录取位次更低，可作为稳妥选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Northwest University in Tianjin's comprehensive category were: approximately 9238 in 2021, 9389 in 2022, 10703 in 2023, 10384 in 2024, and 9591 in 2025. Overall, it shows a fluctuating trend of "backward shift—correction": from 2021 to 2023, it shifted backward by about 1465 places, slightly moved forward in 2024, and further advanced to 9591 in 2025, recovering about 1112 places from the low in 2023, indicating a rebound in application popularity in recent years. The university's enrollment plan in Tianjin: 35 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 38 from 2024 to 2025; in 2026, it will significantly expand to 63 students, an increase of 25 students compared to 2025, a growth of about 65.8%. Such a substantial expansion will significantly increase admission slots, exerting notable downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northwest University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. It ranks approximately 70th on the Soft Science China University Main Ranking (2026), with stable rankings in the 64–70 range in recent years, placing it among mid-to-upper tier 211 universities with relatively strong comprehensive strength. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving an incident where Associate Professor Jia Qianqian from the School of Liberal Arts was reported for suspected plagiarism; the university has quickly established a task force to investigate. Its Douyin popularity ranks 81st, with an evaluation of "average," comprehensive popularity of about 289,000, and medium-low short video exposure, with no high-attention signals. There have been no significant admission gaps in recent years. Overall, the reputation has a neutral to slightly negative impact on application popularity. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Northwest University has three A- or above disciplines: Geology A, Archaeology A, and Software Engineering A-. Among these, Archaeology directly corresponds to the admission major "Cultural Heritage and Museology," Software Engineering relates to majors like "Computer Class" and "Software Engineering," and Geology relates to majors like "Earth Information Science and Technology" and "Resource Exploration Engineering," which have some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, major popularity shows: Computer Class, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended; Law, Chinese Language and Literature are differentiated and wait-and-see; Foreign Language and Literature, Chemical and Pharmaceutical Class (part of the biology, chemistry, environment, materials category) have low popularity or are clearly discouraged. The total number of examinees in Tianjin for the 2026 college entrance exam is about 82,000 (data marked as "uncertain"), an increase of about 14% from 71,938 in 2025, intensifying competition. The provincial control line for the undergraduate batch in 2025 was 476 points, with a slight upward trend in recent years; 2026 data is missing. Northwest University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province (main campus), with a low proportion of enrollment in Tianjin, and no significant preference signals for local or neighboring provinces. The university has a large enrollment proportion in Shaanxi Province, and Tianjin is an ordinary out-of-province market for cross-provincial enrollment, so regional preference factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 9591 in 2025, the strongest influencing factor of a significant enrollment expansion of about 65.8% in 2026 (63 vs. 38 students), along with secondary factors such as intensified competition due to a 14% increase in Tianjin examinees and slightly negative reputation, the expansion effect is significantly greater than the examinee increase effect. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will notably shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 13576, with a range of 13076–14076.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Class (Computer Science and Technology, Internet of Things Engineering, Software Engineering)
- Cultural Heritage and Museology
- History (Base Class)
- Information and Computing Science (Cybersecurity Experimental Class)
- Biological Science (Huada Innovation Class)
- Geographic Science Class.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Physics Class (Physics, Applied Physics, Materials Physics, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering)
- Chemistry (Base Class)
- Earth Information Science and Technology
- Food Science and Engineering
- Business Administration Class (Business Administration, Accounting)
- Finance (Kaiyuan Securities Intelligent Finance Experimental Class)
- Chemical and Pharmaceutical Class
- International Economics and Trade (Global Silk Road Cooperation and Development Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Social Work
- Foreign Language and Literature Class (English, Japanese, Russian).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Northwest University will significantly expand enrollment in Tianjin to 63 students, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 13576, range 13076–14076. Candidates with rankings within this range are advised to primarily fill Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 13000) can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors like Computer Class and Cultural Heritage and Museology; candidates with rankings near the upper limit (around 14000) should use Tier 3 majors as safety and Tier 2 majors as primary choices. Note that majors with lower social popularity, such as Chemical and Pharmaceutical Class and Business Administration Class, may have lower admission rankings and can be considered as stable choices.
